race.description: Ladbrokes Stradbroke Calcutta Book Now Hcp (Bm78)
race.comment: CAPTAIN MAVERICK (4) is knocking on the door of another victory with three consecutive placings and this is not an overly strong affair. Drawn to get all the favours from the inside marble and should be right there at the business end. RATTLE AND HUM (1) has placed two from two over this trip and will strip fitter second-up from the break. Top three credentials on best figures. CHILLAXING (7) handy gelding who is racing well, including a win last start over 2150m at Ipswich. Definite threat. THE IRISH (3) has a handy record around this circuit with a win and two placings from four spins. Sure to be thereabouts. The well-related HIGHGROVE ROSE (9) (half to G2 winner Not An Option) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be slept on.
